name: cross-repo-isolation
task: Recall the repository-specific basename subpath routing convention.

records.label: target-basename-routing
records.text: This repository evaluates basename and VITE_APP_BASENAME subpath routing notes only when scoped to this repo.

records.label: other-repo-basename-routing
records.text: RAGAPPv3 uses VITE_APP_BASENAME for basename subpath routing.
